description: Create comprehensive test suite for all QuantDrive services. Each service needs a dedicated .test.ts file in backend/__tests__/ following the mock-based DI pattern used in the rest of the ecosystem (createMockPrisma factory, vi.fn() mocks, describe/it blocks). Tests must exercise real code paths and verify E2E encryption round-trips, quota enforcement, version history, trash retention, AI categorization, and sharing key exchange.
steps: Create apps/quantdrive/backend/__tests__/file.service.test.ts - Test upload/download encryption round-trip (content identical after encrypt then decrypt), metadata CRUD, soft delete, file not found errors, unauthorized access. Verify that encrypted content differs from plaintext.

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/__tests__/folder.service.test.ts - Test create folder, nested folder creation, list folders, move folder, delete folder (empty and non-empty), get folder path breadcrumb.

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/__tests__/share.service.test.ts - Test share file (key exchange), share folder, accept share (both users can access), revoke share, list shares, share with non-existent user error.
Create apps/quantdrive/backend/__tests__/version.service.test.ts - Test create version on update, list versions, restore previous version, purge expired versions (>30 days removed).
Create apps/quantdrive/backend/__tests__/trash.service.test.ts - Test move to trash, restore from trash, list trash, empty trash (permanent delete), purge expired (>30 days auto-removed).

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/__tests__/storage-quota.service.test.ts - Test getUsage, checkQuota passes for under-limit, checkQuota throws for over-limit, tier enforcement (free=15GB, standard=100GB, premium=2TB), upgradeTier.
Create apps/quantdrive/backend/__tests__/ai-organize.service.test.ts - Test file categorization: .pdf -> Documents, .jpg -> Images, receipt.pdf -> Receipts, .ts -> Code. Test autoOrganize moves file.

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/__tests__/ai-duplicate.service.test.ts - Test computeHash produces consistent hashes, findDuplicates groups similar files, compareTwoFiles returns high score for identical content and low score for different content.
Create apps/quantdrive/backend/__tests__/ai-search-content.service.test.ts - Test indexFile stores searchable content, searchContent returns matching files with snippets, empty query returns nothing.
Create apps/quantdrive/backend/__tests__/ai-summarize-file.service.test.ts - Test summarization returns title, summary, and key points. Different file types produce appropriate summaries.

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/__tests__/ai-extract-data.service.test.ts - Test receipt extraction returns vendor/date/total/items. Test invoice extraction returns invoiceNumber/vendor/dueDate/lineItems.
Run pnpm install from workspace root to ensure the new package is recognized, then run the full test suite to verify everything passes.
acceptance_criteria: All 11 test files exist and pass when running `NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run`
File service tests verify encrypt/decrypt round-trip produces identical content
Share service tests verify both users can access after key exchange
Storage quota tests verify exceeding quota produces an error
AI organize tests verify correct categorization of test files
AI duplicate tests verify similar file detection
Version history tests verify previous versions are retrievable
Trash tests verify 30-day retention then permanent delete
TypeScript strict mode passes with no errors
verification: Run `NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run` from apps/quantdrive directory and confirm all tests pass
Run `npx tsc --noEmit -p apps/quantdrive/tsconfig.backend.json` from repo root to verify TypeScript compiles
